_comment: Static inputs for the demo optimization. 48 half-hour slots, index 0 = 00:00 ... 47 = 23:30. prod_pct = allocated PV production (% of peak). hvac_baseline = the un-optimized/forecast schedule (morning + evening grid hours) used as the comparison baseline. The suggested (optimized) AC schedule is no longer stored here — demoData.js derives it per run from the noised baseline metrics.
